name: Symphonic Warrior Drumss
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>音響戦士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>サウンドウォリアー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ドラムス
desc: Once per turn, you can declare 1 Attribute and select 1 face-up "Symphonic Warrior" monster on the field. That monster becomes that Attribute. You can declare 1 Attribute and remove from play this card from your Graveyard to select 1 face-up "Symphonic Warrior" monster you control, and make it that Attribute.
flavor: Once per turn, you can declare 1 Attribute and select 1 face-up "Symphonic Warrior" monster on the field. That monster becomes that Attribute. You can declare 1 Attribute and remove from play this card from your Graveyard to select 1 face-up "Symphonic Warrior" monster you control, and make it that Attribute.

banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
